Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-20 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker shows TNGX at the top with a dominant 97.8 composite score, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 1022.54% and perfect consistency across all ratio checks (5/5 passes) while clearing every moving average hurdle. However, TNGX's strength appears concentrated in longer timeframes—the 1-day return of just 0.52% against 1-week of 12.25% reveals a heavily backloaded rally, though its 0.38 bad SPY day resilience score suggests it held up reasonably during market downturns. PL ranks second with a 683.1% annual return and all SMA gates passed, but shows concerning ratio weakness (only 3/5 passes) and a much higher bad SPY day score of 2.81, indicating it sells off sharply when the broader market struggles. The data reveals a trade-off between the two leaders: TNGX offers smoother ratio progression and market-agnostic resilience, while PL delivers recent momentum (25.48% 1-day) but with notably greater volatility and correlation to broad market stress.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
